# Docs Lookup Notes: issue-71

External documentation lookup was not required for Phase 1.

Reason: issue #65 already records the GitLab CLI/API references used for the redesign, and #71 work can be verified against repository-owned scripts, manifests, install behavior, and docs surfaces. The implementation should avoid introducing new external GitLab behavior beyond the existing `glab`, GitLab issue, and merge request concepts already present in the completed child issues.
